overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character descending in an elevator through a neon-lit urban market and emerging into a foggy Night City street. The clip features heavy atmospheric fog, holographic billboards, and cyberpunk architecture with vibrant neon lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator interior with digital advertising screens

events.description: digital advertisement screens cycle from First BCG to RCO Security branding

agents.ego_description: standing in elevator watching rotating advertisements on digital screens

entered.detail: metal roll-up shutter doors with horizontal slats and weathered texture
four illuminated digital screens displaying rotating cyberpunk advertisements
illuminated horizontal banners advertising braindance and job upgrades
vertical metallic control panel with illuminated buttons between screen pairs

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a confined metal elevator with shutter doors closed. Digital screens display rotating cyberpunk advertisements while the camera pans slightly, showing the industrial metallic interior and control panel. The environment is artificially lit with no natural light visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with food stalls and steam effects

events.description: elevator shutter doors open revealing covered market area with food stalls
begins walking forward out of elevator into market space

agents.ego_description: walking out of elevator into covered market area with food vendors

notable_agents.action: couple standing together facing the elevator exit, conversing

entered.detail: food stall with large red vertical banner reading WAGAMI MARKET and illuminated counter
serving counter with steam rising and cooking equipment visible
fluorescent tube lighting along the covered walkway ceiling

segments.scene_description: The elevator doors open to reveal a covered market walkway. A couple stands near the exit as the camera moves forward past the Wagami Market food stall with its red banner and steaming counter. The area is sheltered with artificial lighting and concrete flooring.

events.description: descends concrete stairs to lower market level
ascends stairs on opposite side toward street level

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs through lower level and ascending back up to street level

entered.detail: descending concrete stairs with metal railings and edge lighting
food cart with green umbrella and illuminated menu on lower level

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a transitional stairwell, descending to a lower market level with a food cart, then ascending back up. The environment is enclosed with concrete walls and artificial lighting, serving as a connector between the covered market and the open street above.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy neon-lit urban intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: emerges from covered stairwell into open foggy street with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through foggy city streets past neon signs, billboards, and food carts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red mohawk walking past burrito food cart

entered.detail: large vertical holographic billboard displaying PASSION movie with figure wearing crown of thorns
illuminated building signage for Masala Studios glowing orange against fog
overhead illuminated sign for Mark 24 store with green and white lettering
tall palm trees silhouetted against the foggy neon-lit background
illuminated food cart with vendor and menu display on sidewalk
multiple neon signs and holographic displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell into a wide-open urban intersection bathed in neon light and heavy fog. Large holographic billboards including the Passion movie poster and Masala Studios sign dominate the skyline. The camera walks past palm trees and food carts, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk while pedestrians move through the atmospheric cyberpunk streetscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile confinement of an industrial elevator into the bustling, artificial atmosphere of a covered urban market. It begins inside a metal elevator cabin where digital screens flicker with cyberpunk advertisements against a windowless, metallic interior. As the shutter doors slide open, the camera glides forward into a sheltered walkway, passing a couple and the steaming counters of a Wagami Market food stall under a red banner. The scene then shifts into a transitional concrete stairwell, descending toward a lower market level with a food cart before ascending back up toward the exit.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stairwell into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban intersection shrouded in heavy fog. It begins by emerging from the enclosure into the open air, where the atmosphere immediately shifts to a dense, glowing haze. As the camera advances, the skyline opens up to reveal towering holographic billboards, including the Passion movie poster and Masala Studios sign, which cast vibrant light over the street. The movement then carries the viewer past tropical palm trees and street-side food carts before finally crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst a flow of pedestrians in the atmospheric cyberpunk landscape.
